meta.title: Morphology of a Reo-like Virus Isolated from Juvenile American Oysters (Crassostrea virginica)

abstractHtml:
Rotational enhancement of image detail performed on a proposed new serotype of reovirus suggested icosahedral symmetry of T = 3 with some morphological features of members of the Reoviridae family.

* Present address: Department of Veterinary Microbiology, Faculty of Agriculture, Gifu University, Gifu, Japan.
